Edit PDF

Open, search text, and read PDF books or files with high-performance scrolling.

Number Pages

Stamp custom page numbering configurations (e.g. Page X of Y) onto footer layouts.

Open Tool→

Crop PDF

Adjust page boundaries, trim empty white margins, or crop canvas sections.

Open Tool→

Redact PDF

Permanently black out and scrub sensitive text, PII, or data fields.

Open Tool→

Watermark PDF

Apply text or image watermark stamps with custom opacity levels.

Open Tool→

PDF Form Filler

Interactively fill in text fields, select options, and save PDF forms.

Open Tool→

Share PDF

Generate temporary secure preview files or transfer client-side PDFs easily.

Open Tool→

Sign PDF

Draw your signature, upload image initials, and sign documents client-side.

Open Tool→

Request Signatures

Prepare signature placeholders and request document signatures online.

Open Tool→

Why choose browser-based client-side processing?

Conventional PDF conversion websites require uploading your confidential PDFs, documents, invoices, or legal contracts to their servers. This presents critical data leakage risks.

Word To PDF Convertor executes operations directly inside your web browser. Utilizing modern WebAssembly compiled libraries, documents are processed directly inside your local memory buffer.

No Size Limitations

Process files of any size without worrying about upload quotas.

Instant Generation

Save time by avoiding upload/download network delays.

Enterprise Grade Privacy

Comply with HIPAA, GDPR, and organizational privacy policies.

Completely Free

No subscriptions, sign-ups, or annoying watermark restrictions.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Word To PDF Convertor completely free?

Yes, all our PDF tools are 100% free to use. There are no hidden fees, subscriptions, or daily limits.

Are my files safe and secure?

Absolutely. We use local WebAssembly technology, meaning your files are processed entirely inside your browser and are never uploaded to any remote server.

Do you add watermarks to my PDFs?

No. Your generated and edited documents remain completely clean and professional without any third-party branding.

Does it work on mobile devices?

Yes, our tools are fully responsive and work smoothly across iOS, Android, macOS, and Windows without needing any app installations.

Is there a limit on file size or pages?

Since all processing is done locally on your device, there are no artificial file size limits. The only limit is your browser's local memory capacity.

Do I need to install any software?

No installation is required. Our entire suite of tools runs directly inside your web browser as a modern web application.

Can I convert scanned documents?

Yes, we offer an advanced client-side OCR (Optical Character Recognition) tool to extract text from scanned PDFs and images.

Is batch processing supported?

Yes, many of our tools like Merge PDF allow you to select and process multiple files at once for maximum productivity.

What formats can I convert to PDF?

You can easily convert Word, Excel, PowerPoint, JPG, PNG, plain text files, HTML, and many other formats into high-quality PDFs.

Do you keep a copy of my converted files?

No. Because we use a zero-upload model, your files never leave your computer. We have zero access to your data, ensuring absolute privacy.

Word To PDF Convertor

Fast, secure, and free online PDF tools. All operations are executed directly inside your browser—keeping your files 100% private.

Files never upload to servers.
